name: Popover with Hot Turkey Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, beat eggs until lemon-colored and foamy.
2. Add milk, flour, and salt; beat just until smooth (do not overbeat).
3. Pour mixture into a greased 10-inch glass pie plate.
4. Bake at 400 degrees for 35-40 minutes or until deep golden brown.
5. Immediately prick with a fork in the center to allow steam to escape.
6. Combine the remaining ingredients in a saucepan; cook and stir over low heat until heated through.
7. Stir in potato chips.
8. Spoon into popover.
9. Garnish with tomato wedges if desired.
10. Serve immediately.
